name: Adrenal CT
description: CT of the adrenal glands for evaluation of adrenal pathology

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen was performed with adrenal protocol imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Adrenal Gland
sections.content: The right adrenal gland demonstrates [normal morphology / no mass / no thickening]. The gland is [normal in size / not enlarged].

sections.name: Left Adrenal Gland
sections.content: The left adrenal gland demonstrates [normal morphology / no mass / no thickening]. The gland is [normal in size / not enlarged].

sections.name: Adrenal Morphology
sections.content: The adrenal glands demonstrate [typical inverted Y or V shape / no abnormal enhancement]. No adrenal hyperplasia.

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: The kidneys, liver, and pancreas are [unremarkable / no mass]. No abdominal lymphadenopathy.

impression:
1. Normal adrenal CT.
2. No adrenal mass, nodule, or hyperplasia identified.
